case_title: CALFOX, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION, FELL PROPERTIES vs. WNOROWSKI, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: CALFOX, INC. A CALIFORNIA BARBARA E. HERZIG, ESQ. CORPORATION, ET AL. VS. MICHAEL, WNOROWSKI IN PRO PER 9:35 A.M. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT MICHAEL WNOROWSKI. PRIMA FACIE CASE PRE- SENTED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS, HAVIER MALDONADO SWORN AND EXAMAINED. ORAL TESTIMONY RECEIVED. DOCUMENTARY TESTIMONY RECEIVED. THE COURT AFTER TESTIMONY ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AT 1390 MARKET STREET #1506 S.F. CA. AND FOR UNPAID RENT OF $819.97, DAMAGES OF $1,557.81 AND ATTORNEY FEES AND COST PER COST BILL. FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE WAS ALSO ORDERED. PLTF. TO APPLY ANY PORTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WHICH IS NOT REQUIRED TO CLEAN OR REPAIR AGAINST ANY SUMS DUE PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WNOROWSKI, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET STREET #1506 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,377.78 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,377.78, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTORNEY FEES AND COST PER COST BILL. PLTFS. TO APPLY ANY PORTION OF SECURITY DEPOSIT NOT REQUIRED TO CLEAN OR REPAIR TO SUMS DUE PLAINTIFFS.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WNOROWSKI, MICHAEL
